task_completion.description: Verify the site name and support email have been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT General Settings page. The 'Site Name' field should be set to 'Global Retail Assets' and the 'Support Email' field should be set to 'it-support@globalretail.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default currency has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT Localization Settings page. The 'Default Currency' field should be set to 'GBP'.

task_completion.description: Verify the header color has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT Branding Settings page. The 'Header Color' field should be set to '#0055A4', or the top navigation header of the application should visibly reflect this dark blue color.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Laptops' category requires acceptance and sends emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Categories list view or the 'Laptops' category edit page. The settings for 'Require Acceptance' and 'Send Email' must be checked, enabled, or display 'Yes' for the Laptops category.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Tablets' category requires acceptance and sends emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Categories list view or the 'Tablets' category edit page. The settings for 'Require Acceptance' and 'Send Email' must be checked, enabled, or display 'Yes' for the Tablets category.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT admin dashboard, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify that categories other than 'Laptops' and 'Tablets' were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Categories list view, other categories (e.g., Desktops, Mobile Phones) should NOT have 'Require Acceptance' or 'Send Email' newly enabled.

integrity.description: Verify that the settings were actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for green success banners (e.g., 'Settings updated successfully' or 'Category updated successfully') or evidence that the agent clicked the 'Save' button after entering the new values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected site name is 'Global Retail Assets'. The expected default currency is 'GBP'. The expected support email is 'it-support@globalretail.com'. The expected header color is '#0055A4'.
